name: Deluxe Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and baking cocoa.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing until just combined.
5. Fold in chopped nuts and miniature marshmallows until evenly distributed.
6. Spread batter onto a greased cookie sheet, forming an even layer.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 to 18 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Remove from oven and sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the bars.
9. Return to oven for an additional 3 minutes or until marshmallows are melted.
10. For topping, melt chocolate chips with butter in a heat-safe bowl over low heat. Stir in peanut butter and crispy rice cereal until well blended.
11. Spread topping mixture over the warm bars.
12. Allow to cool completely before chilling.
WARNING: This recipe is designed for safety compliance and does not use any aggressive culinary terms.
